heading: This Afternoon
text: Variable clouds and smoke. Chance of a late-day shower or storm far north.

heading: Tonight
text: Scattered showers and storms, mainly north; storms could be severe.

heading: Wednesday
text: Chance of an early shower, then chance late in the north.

heading: Thursday
text: Rising chance of afternoon showers and storms north.
temperature: Upper 70s to upper 80s, north to south
